topic: Why tall people get more cancer
caption: Did you know being tall increases your cancer risk? 💡 Studies show that for every 10cm of height, the risk of cancer increases by 10-15%! 📊 This is because tall people have more cells in their body, which means more opportunities for cancer-causing mutations to occur. 🧬 But don't worry, there are things you can do to reduce your risk. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏💖🔥
